data.name: Sweet Portal
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Portal - 是一款清版射擊類遊戲，玩家需堅持至時間結束或擊倒指定數目的敵人傳送門便會出現，玩家走進傳送門後便能通關，八位女孩的傳送門正等著你啊。

遊戲有三個等級：

1.玩家需堅持至時間結束

2.擊倒指定數目的敵人

3.玩家需堅持至時間結束及擊倒指定數目的敵人

完成目標後傳送門便會出現，玩家走進傳送門後便能通關，通關後便可進入畫廊模式觀看八位女孩的色色圖或繼續挑戰，成功通關後可隨時進入畫廊模式。

在圖庫可按"A","D"或左右方向鍵切換上或下一幅圖

滑鼠滾輪可放大縮細圖片，按著滑鼠左右可拖動圖片

* 圖片大小為 960x1088 px

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Portal
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Portal - is a clearing and shooting game. Players need to hold on until the time is up or knock down a specified number of enemies, and then a portal will appear. Players can pass the level after entering the portal. The portals of eight girls are waiting for you.

The game has three levels:

1. Players need to hold on until the time is up

2. Knock down a specified number of enemies

3. Players need to hold on until the time is up and knock down a specified number of enemies

After completing the goal, a portal will appear. Players can pass the level after entering the portal. After passing the level, they can enter the gallery mode to watch the erotic pictures of the eight girls or continue the challenge. After successfully passing the level, they can enter the gallery mode at any time.

In the gallery, you can press "A", "D" or the left and right arrow keys to switch to the previous or next picture

The mouse wheel can zoom in and out of the picture, and the mouse can be dragged left and right

* The picture size is 960x1088 px
